description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (MSYS2 for Windows) that runs on every push to all branches and on all pull requests to any branch. Use a windows-2022 job with a matrix strategy to build for multiple editions, compilers, targets, and CPU architectures. Check out the repository, install required packages with pacman, and then run a PowerShell script to build the project using the specified matrix parameters. Upload the resulting build artifacts.
